member.name: T:STV.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:STV.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:STV.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:STV.My.Resources.Resources.loading
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:STV.My.Resources.Resources.loading2
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:STV.My.Resources.Resources.loading21
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:STV.My.Resources.Resources.loading22
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:STV.My.Resources.Resources.search
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: T:STV.dsSoRevision
member.summary: Represents a strongly typed in-memory cache of data.

member.name: T:STV.dsSoRevision.SoRevisionDataTable
member.summary: Represents the strongly named DataTable class.
